subject: Gaming
title: Arcade High Scores: The Original Leaderboard
description: Learn Arcade High Scores: The Original Leaderboard in one minute.

hook.text: In the 1980s, your three initials on an arcade machine were your reputation. High scores were everything.

buildup.text: Players memorized patterns and exploited mechanics to squeeze every possible point from each quarter.

discovery.text: Twin Galaxies became the official scorekeeping organization. Players traveled nationwide to set records.

twist.text: Billy Mitchell's perfect Pac-Man game in 1999 took six hours. He later faced fraud allegations.

climax.text: Arcade high score culture created the competitive mindset that esports would later scale globally.

punchline.text: Three initials on a screen. The first competitive gaming identity.

quiz.question: What role did Twin Galaxies play in competitive gaming?
options: It was the official scorekeeping organization for arcade records
It was a game development studio
